expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory for the large 75+ file scope
expectations.evidence: Contains '[!NOTE] Complexity advisory' with Formatting mixed with logic dimension
Other changes section discusses @deprecated JSDoc, UmbDeprecation.warn(), kept until Umbraco 19

expectations.text: Checks frontend-specific breaking changes (exports, custom elements) not just backend
expectations.evidence: Modified public API lists all alias renames and kind changes

expectations.text: Findings reference specific files with line numbers
expectations.evidence: All Important and Suggestion items reference specific file paths

expectations.text: Properly deprecated code is NOT flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: No Critical section — deprecated modals and old action classes handled correctly as deprecated, not breaking

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: UX misleading ellipsis, i18n hardcoded string, formatting mixed with logic
